reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Hotel standard has dropped compare to five years ago…the food also not that nice..the worst is even the  tea I drink was cold as well…and after stayed there for 2 night me and my daughter both has very bad rashes on our body..I assume it was bedbug….think the hotel should work hard for the cleanliness and the food quality…

reviews.title: Good but not great
reviews.text:
Stayed 2 nights at Doubletree Hilton. Rooms were ok, it was spacious however it is in serious need of an update. Toilets had a slight smell to it, but did not spread throughout the room. 
Breakfast was good, and wide variety of western and eastern selections to choose from. 
Location was good, had plenty of eateries nearby. 
However, what is lacking was a self-service laundry. Stayed at local chinese hotel prior to this and the hotels all came with a self-service laundry which came very handy. When local hotels can provide that, i dont see why a big brand chain hotel is unable to do so. 
Would i be staying here again when im back? Probably not.

reviews.title: A Comfortable Stay with Room for Improvement
reviews.text: The cleanliness was commendable, and the staff were friendly and helpful. The facilities were well-maintained and added to the comfort of the stay. Despite few minor drawbacks, the hotel still offered a pleasant stay. I would recommend it to those who prioritize cleanliness and good service over location and cost.

reviews.text: The location for shopping area is far.

reviews.title: Great Room and Helpful Staff
reviews.text: The room is very spacious and with a long executive table.  The staff is very efficient with express check in.  Can arrange hotel transport to transfer guest with reasonable price.  Shall visit the hotel if I visit Putian again

reviews.title: Very nice hotel but getting taxi is a nightmare
reviews.text: A very nice hotel with helpful concierge staff. The hotel is generally great except that there are no taxis in the lobby area. Every time you need a taxi the concierge staff needs to call for you. Concierge staff acknowledged as an issue and hotel is working with taxi companies.

reviews.title: Very Good Service
reviews.text: Receptionists are all very kind and helpful. They are able to accommodate all queries and provide all guidance to us. We got an upgrade with free breakfast. The breakfast spread is continental and a lot choices!

reviews.title: Clean. smell nice and comfy bed.
reviews.text:
we stayed at double tree putian for 3 nights and the stay was pleasant and nice. the lobby is big and smell really nice. the bed is very comfortable, clean. shower was hot and powerful. staffs were friendly and helpful. 
we had problem calling for a cab to sent us to the airport because we do not have the china online payment app, one of the bell boy by the name of Morgan helped us call the cab and paid for us. we then TT the money back to him using another's friend china payment app.

reviews.title: Still fantastic after last stay
reviews.text: A simple gesture from Hilton Putian has definitely delighted us and made our stay purposeful.

reviews.negatives: Отель очень уставший. Завтрак очень китайский. Администраторы неприветливые.

reviews.title: I have stayed here before, but the standard seems to have dropped substantially.
reviews.positives: The breakfast was of a good quality, except that the egg station mass produced fried eggs so that anyone eating one, had to eat it cold. Staff were, however, receptive and friendly and a special mention for the front office staff and the restaurant staff.
reviews.negatives:
The restaurant was non functional for dinner except on Friday and Saturday, leaving guests with the option of choosing from a very limited room service menu or finding a restaurant outside of the hotel. For international travellers, this is not easy to do owing to the language barrier.

The room air-conditioning was extremely poor and I was unable to sleep comfortably. Eventually, I had to ask for a pedestal fan so that I could actually get some sleep.

reviews.title: Could use a little renovation
reviews.positives: The facilities were great! Love the gym and the pool but unfortunately I didnt get to swim, I only visited it. Overal clean room and the staff were super helpful and friendly.
reviews.negatives: The renovation is a bit old, and you can see chipped tiles, tap with hardened minerals on it, the drawer didnt close properly because of wear and tear.

reviews.title: Beautiful
